entities.name: Strength (Phase 2 Ramp-Up)
entities.context: Strength training workout scheduled for Mondays and Fridays, 45 minutes each

entities.name: Engine Building
entities.context: Cardio/conditioning workout scheduled for Tuesdays (30-40m) and Saturdays as a long session (50-60m)

entities.name: The 20% Interval
entities.context: Interval training workout scheduled for Thursdays, 35 minutes

entities.name: Recovery Walk / Mobility
entities.context: Active recovery session scheduled for Wednesdays, 20 minutes

entities.name: Foundation (Weeks 1-4)
entities.context: Initial 4-week training phase establishing the base schedule

relationships.context: Phase 2 Ramp-Up strength work is a core component of the Weeks 1-4 Foundation schedule
Engine Building sessions (regular and long) are part of the Foundation phase
Thursday interval session is part of the Foundation phase schedule
Mid-week recovery is built into the Foundation phase
Both are conditioning-focused workouts complementing the strength days
Recovery day placed between strength and interval days for adequate rest
